source: User-supplied planning form normalized by architecture, security, privacy, operations, and product constraints.

overrides: proposed defaults and unresolved non-secret values in docs/codex-master-plan/HUMAN_INPUT_REGISTRY.json
cannot_override: migration, network, secret, deployment, or release gates

schedule.kickoff_condition: The current active phase is completed, program governance is merged, CI expansion is operational, and required owners are assigned.
schedule.note: A 16-week target is retained only as a stretch target for a constrained public beta, not production GA. Provider licensing, compliance review, model evidence, penetration testing, and deployment readiness may extend the schedule.

budget_planning_envelope.note: These are planning envelopes, not vendor quotes or financial commitments.

priority_order: partner API after load and abuse testing
optional proof verification only after legal and provider approval

product.primary_audience: Persian-speaking football supporters in Iran and the diaspora, with English support for regional users.
product.competition_condition: A competition is production-supported only after TxLINE snapshot coverage, historical depth, licensing, identifiers, and quality evidence are verified.

season_scope.next_season: enabled only when provider schedules and identifiers are verified

out_of_scope_v1: betting, wagering, stake, payout, profit, or trading features

brand_and_ux.design_direction: Dark-mode-first, data-dense but calm, mobile-first, with restrained motion for probability changes and complete RTL/LTR parity.
brand_and_ux.font_policy: Prefer a properly licensed open-source Persian/Latin family such as Vazirmatn. Do not ship a proprietary font without documented distribution rights.
brand_and_ux.release_gate: Final logo, color tokens, icon set, and bilingual content review are required before Phase 10L completion.

initial_rate_limits.policy: Configurable and reduced automatically under abuse, dependency degradation, or capacity pressure.

public_api_policy.cache_policy: Short-lived edge caching is allowed only for public-safe responses and must preserve freshness metadata.

database.topology: separate development, staging, and production databases
database.provider_selection: Hard-gated pending legal/compliance and provider-terms review; AWS RDS is a candidate, not an approved commitment.

data_retention.normalized_sports_data: 24 months by default, subject to provider license and product need
data_retention.raw_provider_payload: disabled by default; incident-only capture maximum 7 days with encryption and restricted access

txline.staging_host_note: No separate staging host is documented. Do not invent one; use the documented test environment until TxLINE confirms otherwise.
txline.rate_limit_and_quota: Unresolved until the provider contract or current service-level response is reviewed.
txline.fixture_scope: Only verified subscribed competitions returned by the current snapshot API.

private_prediction_policy.runtime: separate containerized inference service with independent scaling and health checks
private_prediction_policy.baseline_family: private statistical baseline using competition-aware goal and strength features
private_prediction_policy.fallback_policy: On inference timeout, failure, low feature coverage, or failed quality gate, return baseline_fallback or unavailable with explicit public quality labeling. Never silently substitute a standard prediction.
private_prediction_policy.calibration_storage: versioned private PostgreSQL records or private artifact storage referenced by immutable hash
private_prediction_policy.secret_and_ip_policy: No coefficients, training data, feature weights, thresholds, provider weights, or internal confidence formula in public Git, logs, public API, or frontend.

prediction_quality.brier_policy: Use target-specific definitions and compare with declared naive and statistical baselines. Production requires at least 5 percent relative improvement over the approved baseline and no critical segment regression greater than 2 percent. Do not apply one universal Brier threshold across incompatible target definitions.

freshness_policy.note: Final thresholds must be derived from actual TxLINE cadence and validated in Phase 10J; stale core live state must downgrade or suppress output.

notifications.unsubscribe_behavior: Immediate disablement, revoke delivery jobs, and schedule personal identifier deletion according to retention policy.
notifications.material_change_policy: Private server-side policy; no internal threshold exposed publicly.

solana.allowed_v1_scope: Offline proof transport and structural validation only.
solana.future_reconsideration_gate: Separate legal, provider, security, budget, and human approval after v1.

hosting.candidate_primary: AWS eu-central-1 using ECS/Fargate, ECR, RDS PostgreSQL, and ElastiCache
hosting.candidate_alternative: An EU-hosted managed container and PostgreSQL provider with equivalent security and contractual approval
hosting.provider_commitment: Not approved until legal/compliance review and provider account eligibility are documented.
hosting.secret_store: AWS Secrets Manager or an approved equivalent
hosting.autoscaling_policy: Scale API and inference independently using bounded CPU, memory, latency, queue-depth, and connection metrics; preserve maximum concurrency caps.

domain_and_dns.tls_management: ACM or automated ACME compatible with the selected platform
domain_and_dns.note: No domain is considered available or owned until registrar and DNS evidence is recorded.

observability.initial_logs_and_metrics: CloudWatch or provider-native managed logs and metrics
observability.tracing: OpenTelemetry with a managed compatible backend
alert_channels: email or PagerDuty for critical alerts

target_jurisdictions: MENA users subject to applicable local law
privacy.under_16_policy: No self-service account or notification enrollment in v1. A parental-consent workflow is deferred until jurisdiction-specific legal design is approved.

legal_basis_provisional.essential_service_data: contract or legitimate interest subject to counsel review
legal_basis_provisional.security_logs: legitimate interest and legal obligation where applicable

retention.watchlist_and_preferences: until deletion or 24 months of inactivity
retention.telegram_chat_identifier: while subscribed and maximum 30 days after unsubscribe

scope: US sanctions and export controls affecting Iran-facing services
TxLINE licensing, payment, token, wallet, and public display terms
EU data protection and international transfers
domain, messaging, error tracking, and payment vendors
compliance.codex_role: Codex may prepare inventories, technical controls, data-flow diagrams, and checklists, but may not give final legal approval or open paid accounts.

final_release_requires: exact immutable commit and signed release artifact

deferred_phases.reason: Solana network access and transactions are disabled for v1. Offline proof contracts remain in 10N-A.

remaining_hard_inputs: Named legal/compliance counsel and written approval scope
TxLINE contract, quota, supported competition identifiers, and display/retention rights
Approved cloud provider account and billing owner
Secret-store locations and environment-variable installation status
Named Backend Lead, ML Lead, DevOps Lead, QA Lead, CTO/Product release approver
Exact private model service implementation and calibration artifact location
Independent penetration-test provider or approved internal alternative
